이사야 35:1.content: The wilderness and the dry land will be glad. The desert will rejoice and blossom like a rose.

이사야 35:2.content: It will blossom abundantly, and rejoice even with joy and singing. Lebanon’s glory will be given to it, the excellence of Carmel and Sharon. They will see Yahweh’s glory, the excellence of our God.

이사야 35:3.content: Strengthen the weak hands, and make the feeble knees firm.

이사야 35:4.content: Tell those who have a fearful heart, “Be strong! Don’t be afraid! Behold, your God will come with vengeance, God’s retribution. He will come and save you.

이사야 35:5.content: Then the eyes of the blind will be opened, and the ears of the deaf will be unstopped.

이사야 35:6.content: Then the lame man will leap like a deer, and the tongue of the mute will sing; for waters will break out in the wilderness, and streams in the desert.

이사야 35:7.content: The burning sand will become a pool, and the thirsty ground springs of water. Grass with reeds and rushes will be in the habitation of jackals, where they lay.

이사야 35:8.content: A highway will be there, a road, and it will be called “The Holy Way”. The unclean shall not pass over it, but it will be for those who walk in the Way. Wicked fools shall not go there.

이사야 35:9.content: No lion will be there, nor will any ravenous animal go up on it. They will not be found there; but the redeemed will walk there.

이사야 35:10.content: Then Yahweh’s ransomed ones will return, and come with singing to Zion; and everlasting joy will be on their heads. They will obtain gladness and joy, and sorrow and sighing will flee away.”
